sourceMovie.title: Muzzle: City of Wolves
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Muzzle: City of Wolves (2025) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Commuter
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Muzzle: City of Wolves clicked for you, The Commuter (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The International
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Muzzle: City of Wolves clicked for you, The International (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Muzzle: City of Wolves?
faq.answer: Try The Commuter, The International, Last Man Down—each shares DNA with Muzzle: City of Wolves while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Muzzle: City of Wolves?
faq.answer: Muzzle: City of Wolves (2025) is best described as Action, Thriller, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Muzzle: City of Wolves part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Muzzle Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
